about_item: [Pet Carrier Airline Approved] With an airline-approved design, Conforms to the under-seat dimensions of most airlines, you can take your pet to go to everywhere. The pet carrier for cat comes with an extendable cozy fleece pet mat, which offers extra sleeping space for your traveling pet.

[Multifunctonal Pet Carrier] The pet carrier airline approved can be carried by hand with the padded top handle, or over the shoulder using the included detachable carrying strap. The strap can also be used as a seatbelt when car travel and a back webbing can fasten the pet carrier to your luggage.

[Perfect for Travel] Our tsa approved pet carrier is easier to get pets in or out because it has 1 top opening and 2 side doors. The pet carrier features 4 mesh panels not only for ventilation but also easy for you to check on your pet. The escape-proof locking zippers and safety hook keep your pet safe.

[Pet Carriers for Small Dogs] The small pet carrier measures 17.5" L x 10.5" W x 10.6" H, recommended max load of 12 lbs pets. Please do not choose your carrier based on weight--please kindly reference your pet's length and height in selecting a carrier size.

[Portable & Collapsible] The tsa approved pet carrier can also be used as a soft-sided crate for regular outings and vet visits with cats and small dogs, it comes with a removable machine washable cozy mat and a large pocket. When not in use, just unzip it and fold it down into a flat package for storage.

certified_by.name: Global Recycled Standard
certified_by.description: Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products contain recycled content that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from the source to the final product and meet social, environmental, and chemical requirements. The purchase of Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products supports the use of recycled content in the supply chain. A product must contain at least 50% certified GRS material to qualify for inclusion in Climate Pledge Friendly.

summary.text: Customers find this pet carrier to be of high quality, spacious, and sturdy, with multiple zip-up doors providing easy access. They appreciate its appearance, construction, and portability, with one customer noting it can rest on top of a suitcase. Customers describe the carrier as comfortable inside, with one mentioning its cozy fold-out bed feature.

authors_reviews.title: Very sturdy
authors_reviews.text: My cats love it and so do I so much better than the old crate type! 😻
authors_reviews.author: Diane Allard

authors_reviews.title: Pretty, sturdy, and easy to use
authors_reviews.text: This cat carrier has been an absolute lifesaver. It is sturdy, and easy to use, and is the perfect size for our kitty. We especially enjoy the choice of openings. It opens on the top, front, and side. Our kitty feels safe and enjoys sitting inside even at home with the large front flap open. The floor of the carrier is soft and unfolds with the large flap opening, and it is machine washable which is very convenient. Sometimes we keep all three openings unzipped at home and watch our kitty play, jumping up, around, and through all the openings. Encouraging this play time helps her to not feel afraid of the carrier and she does not associate it with "going to the vet." Highly recommend.
authors_reviews.author: EGH

authors_reviews.title: Versatile car carrier
authors_reviews.text: I finally got a chance to use this today. It is the right size for my 12 pound cat Chester. The last carrier I had was too big and I think he felt insecure in it. Today we went to the vet, he was cozy inside, didn't cry, just sat there and looked out as I talked to him. There are several zippered sides, I usually put him in the top hole, back feet first, this is the easiest. After the visit I brought him back home and unzipped a side exit and out he went, happy kitty. The one thing I didn't like, minor issue,one side of the carrier (in photo) has no vent for them to see out of. This was resolved by making sure the vented screen side was facing me as we drove. This is a good solid cat carrier for not much money. I am so happy he is comfortable and secure during travel. I highly recommend this product.
authors_reviews.author: Edward Altemus

authors_reviews.title: Pettit travel pet carrier
authors_reviews.text: Awesome carrier that is TSA certified and airlines too. Fits perfectly under the seat in front of you. Do be mindful of the side zippers as they can move open if a lot of movement from animal but it does have a small lease attached inside to prevent animal to escape.
authors_reviews.author: belinda

authors_reviews.title: Not for travel - Safe space for hiding and sleeping
authors_reviews.text: This carrier is not sturdy enough for travel. It has one side door and if you unzip the other side the whole carrier collapses. It is a pretty pink. I really love the top and front openings, and soft extendable cushion. Once home we connected it to a playpen and it has worked great as a safe hiding and sleeping space. It is a good size for our 6 month old kitten.
authors_reviews.author: katie

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bag for my pug puppy
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this dog carrier. I live in Canada, but had to order from amazon.com (as I often do for a better selection) and this carrier did not disappoint. Ordered the medium. I didn’t want black so I was happy to find this chic tan version. Very well made with cord attachment inside that clips to his harness. Strap that slips over luggage handle so carrier can rest on top of suitcase. Lots of easy access points that unzip. Pocket on one end for his collapsable water dish, kong and treats. The best part, is he loves it too!! My pug puppy weighs about 11ish pounds and is about 14 inches head to curl (ahem, tail) and 11 inches tall..shoulder blades to floor. He is comfortable inside, but we definitely couldn’t go smaller. Hope this helps.
authors_reviews.author: summersblue

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!!
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size for my 15 lb cat Zoey!! And it’s very sturdy!!! Love it!!
authors_reviews.author: Vanessa Rodriguez

authors_reviews.title: Nice, small sized carrier. With several opening options for pet entry.
authors_reviews.text: Appears to be constructed well. My cat tolerates driving in it better that the much larger carrier that this product replaced.
authors_reviews.author: Brian Dubis

other_countries_reviews.title: Purrrrfect!
other_countries_reviews.text: These are amazing!!!!! I looked around for almost 2 years to get EVERYTHING i was looking for in new carrier for my male cats (now both 3 and fully grown). The price is excellent for the great quality, they are fairly, light yet study (male cat 13 lbs. Love the end opening, side opening and top opening!!! Love how it opens sideways and works so well for my one cat that is hard to get out then at the vet. Shoulder strap option great but i will not use. Im a little older and these material vs plastic cases are so much lighter to carry and large enough that I know my cats have plenty of room to move. (Too big for air line carry on). They fold easily for storage. Also, there is a floor mat that also folds out with the side door! Purrrrfect!
other_countries_reviews.author: Nancy

other_countries_reviews.title: En general está bien solo tiene un detalle en los cierres.
other_countries_reviews.text: Es buen producto, lo único negativo es que los cierres se atoran y me da miedo que no resistan mucho tiempo. Todo lo demás está perfecto, es cómoda para los gatos, les gustó. Tiene varias puertas para poder sacarlos del transportador. Trae una cobijita cómoda y calientita. Tengo 3 gatos y los llevé al veterinario al mismo tiempo, esta transportadora me facilitó mucho el poder llevar a los 3 al mismo tiempo, ya que puedes colgarla en tu hombro y el michi no deja de ir cómodo. Falta la prueba del avión, cuando la haga regreso a escribir. Conclusión, voy a comprar otras dos para sustituir las que tengo ya viejitas.
other_countries_reviews.author: Olivia J T

other_countries_reviews.title: Perfect for our 11lb Pom
other_countries_reviews.text: We used this successfully for our 11lb Pomeranian while travelling on Viva Aerobus within Mexico. Online, Viva's rules are quite strict; however, we had no issues.Overall, the carrier is of good quality, and we appreciated that the grey one is not 100% see-through, which provided our dog more comfort. It can also be put upright or rotated on the side, which is a benefit when you're not sure what to expect with space under the plane seat.It would also work fine for Porter Air in Canada. We have a slightly bigger carrier for our dog to have more space, which works for Porter.
other_countries_reviews.author: Kristian Wykes

other_countries_reviews.title: Great carrier exactly as described
other_countries_reviews.text: This is a great carrier. Ordered the standard medium size and my under 10 pound Yorkiepoo fit perfectly (she is about 9 inches to her shoulder and just under 12 inches to the top of her head tall). I flew her from LA to Vancouver in it and it met all the requirements for the airline had no issues at all at the airport or on the plane. It fit under the seat well. Quality is good too. It’s sturdy and easily collapsible to pack away.
other_countries_reviews.author: Jen S

other_countries_reviews.title: Great Quality!
other_countries_reviews.text: Originally I purchased the smaller size, which turned out to be just a bit small for my 8 month old kitten because I wanted her to have more room. This carrier is well made and has great features. I have another similar carrier, but this one is far better. First of all having some mesh openings on both ends allows my cat to see me if she is in the passenger seat. With my other carrier this can only be done if I turn it around as one end is solid, but then the larger mesh opening faces the seat restricting air flow which makes a difference. The short handles can be joined together and not interfere with opening the large front entrance/exit area which is also beneficial. This carrier seems to be well made, provides good airflow with the mesh openings, but also allows some privacy if you have a nervous pet. I used this today for the first time for my 8 month old female kitten who is about 7 1/2 lbs and she was very comfortable. My male kitten is just over 10 lbs and he fits in this carrier comfortably as well so it could be used for either one. I prefer the features of this carrier so I will be ordering another one as well. I highly recommend this product.
other_countries_reviews.author: VW
